**Reviewer checklist - verify the repository meets all of the following before approving:**

- [ ] Repository has branch protection rules enabled
- [ ] Pull requests require at least 1 approval before merging
- [ ] Status checks are required to pass before merging
- [ ] Repository has a `SECURITY.md` file (outlining vulnerability disclosure policy)
- [ ] Repository has successfully run the Jenkins pipeline in build-only mode prior to this request
